author: Chris Schommer
title: Rasmus Dahlin tallies two points in Saturday's loss to Capitals
desc: Rasmus Dahlin tallied two points for the Sabres Saturday night, scoring one goal and adding one assist in a 6-2 loss to the Capitals.
impact: Dahlin continues an impactful stretch in the offensive zone, picking up points in six of his last nine games (five goals, four assists) for the Sabres. The 25-year-old continues to reward fantasy managers with a dynamic offensive option while leading the Buffalo blueline, posting 69 points (18 goals, 51 assists) in 73 games so far this season.

author: Chris Schommer
title: Alex Tuch posts assist Saturday against Capitals
desc: Alex Tuch posted one assist in the Sabres' 6-2 loss to the Capitals Saturday night.
impact: Tuch has heated up in the offensive zone of late, notching points in two of his last three games (two assists) for the Sabres. The winger continues to offer head coach Lindy Ruff one of many impactful offensive options in the Buffalo lineup, recording 61 points (29 goals, 32 assists) in 74 games so far this season.

author: Chris Schommer
title: Artturi Lehkonen records assist Saturday against Stars
desc: Artturi Lehkonen recorded one assist in an Avalanche' 2-0 win over the Stars Saturday.
impact: Lehkonen has heated up in the offensive zone of late, picking up points in three of his last five games (one goal, three assists) for the Avalanche. The winger continues to provide head coach Jared Bednar with one of many productive offensive options in the Colorado lineup, notching 46 points (20 goals, 26 assists) in 64 games so far this season.

author: Chris Schommer
title: Martin Necas posts two points in Saturday's win over Stars
desc: Martin Necas posted two points for the Avalanche Saturday, scoring one goal and adding one assist in a 2-0 win over the Stars.
impact: Necas continues an impactful stretch in the offensive zone, tallying points in six of his last eight games (five goals, eight assists) for the Avalanche. The 27-year-old continues to offer fantasy managers one of many options as part of an explosive Colorado lineup, posting a 1.31 point per game average (36 goals, 58 assists) in 72 games so far this season.

author: Chris Schommer
title: Nathan MacKinnon finds back of net in Saturday's win over Stars
desc: Nathan MacKinnon was able to find the back of the net for the Avalanche Saturday, scoring one goal in a 2-0 win over the Stars.
impact: MacKinnon continues a dynamic stretch in the offensive zone, posting points in 16 of his last 19 games (11 goals, 18 assists) for the Avalanche. The superstar center remains an elite offensive option while leading an explosive Colorado lineup for head coach Jared Bednar, carrying a 1.65 point per game average (51 goals, 71 assists) in 74 games so far this season.

author: Chris Schommer
title: Adrian Kempe scores two goals in Thursday's loss to Predators
desc: Adrian Kempe was able to light the lamp for the Kings Thursday night, scoring two goals in a 5-4 loss to the Predators.
impact: Kempe has caught fire in the offensive zone, registering points in each of his last four games (four goals, two assists) for the Kings. The winger remains one of the more stable offensive options in the Los Angeles lineup for interim head coach DJ Smith, posting 65 points (30 goals, 35 assists) in 74 games so far this season.

author: Chris Schommer
title: Anze Kopitar posts assist Thursday against Predators
desc: Anze Kopitar posted one assist in the Kings' 5-4 loss to the Predators Thursday night.

author: Chris Schommer
title: Roman Josi posts assist Thursday against Kings

desc: Jonathan Marchessault notched two points for the Predators Thursday night, scoring one goal and picking up one assist in a 5-4 win over the Kings.
